error_signature: This operation expects the node's input data to contain a binary file 'data'
title: Merge node not finding binary data
symptom: The merge node throws an error stating that it expects binary data, but none is found when merging multiple inputs.
applies_when: Merging two or more nodes with binary data
not_this_if: Only one input node is used
Binary data is present in the input
root_cause: The merge node's configuration may be set to 'append', which causes it to treat multiple inputs as separate items. This can lead to the binary data not being accessible as expected when multiple inputs are merged.
fix_steps: Change the merge mode from 'append' to 'combine by position'
Test the workflow again to ensure binary data is accessible
agent_instruction: Change the merge mode to 'combine by position' in the merge node settings.
